name: INNER EAR
definition: central and most capacious ovoid part of bony labyrinth posterior to cochlea horizontal bony septum dividing IAC into superior and inferior compartments
discriminating_features: vertical orientation transverse to long axis of petrous part of temporal bone
nearly parallel to posterior surface of petrous bone

general: vertical orientation transverse to long axis of petrous part of temporal bone
nearly parallel to posterior surface of petrous bone
